notes: Critical bugs: 't' is out of scope in updateEntities causing JS errors on thrust, respawn logic is permanently broken (dist(400,300,400,300) always returns 0 so ship never respawns), and array mutation during forEach causes collision detection issues.
Game crashes immediately with a 'ReferenceError: t is not defined' when the player attempts to thrust, rendering it unplayable.
The build has major runtime-breaking bugs from undefined variable references in updateEntities/draw, so despite some recognizable Asteroids structure the game is not reliably functional or playable.
